description:
Research the physical properties of five specific chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) to determine their behavior if spilled into a waterway: Benzene (CAS 71-43-2), Carbon tetrachloride (CAS 56-23-5), Acetone (CAS 67-64-1), Chloroform (CAS 67-66-3), and Toluene (CAS 108-88-3). For each chemical, identify the Specific Gravity and Water Solubility to classify behavior as FLOATS (Specific Gravity < 1.0 and Insoluble/Slightly Soluble), SINKS (Specific Gravity > 1.0 and Insoluble/Slightly Soluble), or DISSOLVES (Soluble or Miscible). 

Create two output files in ~/Documents/:
1. 'spill_behavior_summary.csv' with columns: Chemical, CAS, Specific_Gravity, Spill_Behavior.
2. 'spill_behavior_report.txt' containing a detailed block for each chemical with Name, CAS, Specific Gravity, Water Solubility description, and determined Behavior, separated by dashes.
